mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3I-R2 — Snapshot Manifest Size Field Repair

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
source=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\ui\main_window.py"); raw=source.read_bytes(); text=raw.decode("utf-8"); compile(text,str(source),"exec")
assert len(raw)==99077 and hashlib.sha256(raw).hexdigest()=="a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3"
begin=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_DESKTOP_V1A3I_BEGIN\n"; end=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_DESKTOP_V1A3I_END\n"
assert raw.count(begin)==1 and raw.count(end)==1
start=raw.index(begin); finish=raw.index(end,start)+len(end); seam=raw[start:finish]
assert len(seam)==2194 and hashlib.sha256(seam).hexdigest()=="0dd2a54415e29ca4b0cf6edc1d8ee8c00a870dd9359066b9295d486cea78aa6e"
base=raw[:start]+raw[finish:]
assert len(base)==96883 and hashlib.sha256(base).hexdigest()=="cd20a1785a574eae44e290c1af1c1da7ac2bb66559f7d9ce8e93a9b2d6516b36"
checks={
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py":(32524,"e420706136b4902d82d8dbf1fecc64ae70fb8bc639106db41033545f8c196c30"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\DESKTOP_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT_V1.json":(1148,"51603dbe60da228666b39ce88a4c47651bd3fd54e771278926ebaef38a2f0f7a"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\README_V1A3I.md":(422,"1151d297dd8c85fbc79c4a1548c5d7cffc3e10908cacdd451d3e8681201d5946"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py":(None,"a80a9047e0eebd9ac87fe4d656c565bc6534563bb3c97e1ad9b59823a36804f7"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py":(None,"d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952"),
}
for name,(size,digest) in checks.items():
 p=Path(name); data=p.read_bytes(); assert size is None or len(data)==size,(name,len(data)); assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==digest,name
snapshot=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260722-041324-7C825A"); manifests=sorted(snapshot.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json")); assert manifests
manifest=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text(encoding="utf-8")); expected=["System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/DESKTOP_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT_V1.json","System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/README_V1A3I.md","System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/desktop_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py","ui/main_window.py"]
assert sorted(row["relative_path"] for row in manifest["entries"])==expected
source_entry=next(row for row in manifest["entries"] if row["relative_path"]=="ui/main_window.py")
assert source_entry["existed"] is True and source_entry["sha256"]=="cd20a1785a574eae44e290c1af1c1da7ac2bb66559f7d9ce8e93a9b2d6516b36" and source_entry["size"]==96883
support_paths=set(expected)-{"ui/main_window.py"}
for relative_path in sorted(support_paths):
 entry=next(row for row in manifest["entries"] if row["relative_path"]==relative_path)
 assert entry["existed"] is False and entry.get("sha256") is None and entry.get("size") is None, entry
assert "size_bytes" not in source_entry
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3I_R2_PRECONDITIONS_AND_PATCH_OK")

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast,hashlib,json
source=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\ui\main_window.py"); raw=source.read_bytes(); tree=ast.parse(raw.decode("utf-8"))
assert len(raw)==99077 and hashlib.sha256(raw).hexdigest()=="a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3"
begin=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_DESKTOP_V1A3I_BEGIN\n"; end=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_DESKTOP_V1A3I_END\n"; start=raw.index(begin); finish=raw.index(end,start)+len(end)
assert raw.count(begin)==1 and raw.count(end)==1
assert hashlib.sha256(raw[start:finish]).hexdigest()=="0dd2a54415e29ca4b0cf6edc1d8ee8c00a870dd9359066b9295d486cea78aa6e"
base=raw[:start]+raw[finish:]; assert hashlib.sha256(base).hexdigest()=="cd20a1785a574eae44e290c1af1c1da7ac2bb66559f7d9ce8e93a9b2d6516b36" and len(base)==96883
funcs=[n for n in ast.walk(tree) if isinstance(n,(ast.FunctionDef,ast.AsyncFunctionDef)) and n.name=="send_message"]
assert len(funcs)==1 and funcs[0].lineno==2146
assert raw[:start].count(b"\n")+1 > 2146 and raw[:start].count(b"\n")+1 < 2206
assert raw[finish:finish+27]==b"        self.mission_status"
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3I_R2_EXACT_SEAM_AND_SOURCE_STRUCTURE_OK")
validations.name: Verify corrected seam boundary, exact source syntax, one marker pair, and byte-perfect preimage reconstruction

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-041324-7C825A_V1A3I_DESKTOP_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION")
matrix=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_TEST_MATRIX.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); bypass=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_MODEL_BYPASS_EVIDENCE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); preservation=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_ORDINARY_CHAT_PRESERVATION.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); coverage=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_COVERAGE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); patch=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_CHAT_ROUTE_PATCH_MAP.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert patch["post_sha256"]=="a9c5bb86878e5f0cd27d221dbb32688b337e6026073a4b66d83339e0aef294a3" and patch["post_size_bytes"]==99077
assert patch["reconstructed_pre_sha256"]=="cd20a1785a574eae44e290c1af1c1da7ac2bb66559f7d9ce8e93a9b2d6516b36" and patch["reconstructed_pre_size_bytes"]==96883
assert matrix["test_count"]==36 and matrix["all_passed"] is True
assert matrix["counts"]=={"adapter_unavailable_count":2,"ambiguous_count":4,"empty_count":1,"evidence_corruption_count":1,"malformed_count":1,"ordinary_count":12,"recognized_count":11,"unsupported_technical_count":4}
for key in ("director_calls_for_handled","specialist_calls_for_handled","get_ai_response_calls_for_handled","model_thread_calls_for_handled","provider_calls_for_handled","model_calls_for_handled"):
 assert bypass[key]==0
assert preservation["original_route_exactly_once"] is True and preservation["registry_reads_for_unsupported_chat"]==0
assert coverage["workshop_python_alias_resolved"] is False and coverage["pythonw_identity_directly_probed"] is False and coverage["runtime_facts_inferred_across_contexts"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3I_R2_ROUTING_AND_SAFETY_TESTS_OK")

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-041324-7C825A_V1A3I_DESKTOP_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION"); names=set(['DESKTOP_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT.json', 'DESKTOP_CHAT_ROUTE_PATCH_MAP.json', 'DESKTOP_RESPONSE_COMPATIBILITY.json', 'DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_TEST_MATRIX.json', 'DESKTOP_MODEL_BYPASS_EVIDENCE.json', 'DESKTOP_ORDINARY_CHAT_PRESERVATION.json', 'DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_COVERAGE.json', 'DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json']); actual={p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()}; assert actual==names
assert sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.iterdir())<8388608
for p in out.iterdir(): assert b"\r" not in p.read_bytes()
receipt=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); coverage=json.loads((out/"DESKTOP_INTEGRATION_COVERAGE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
mission_plan=json.loads(Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\AGENT_FOX_V1A3I_R2\PLAN.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8")); assert mission_plan["safety"]["prior_failure_classification"]=="snapshot_manifest_size_field_name_mismatch" and mission_plan["safety"]["snapshot_manifest_size_field"]=="size" and mission_plan["safety"]["snapshot_manifest_size_bytes_field_required"] is False and mission_plan["safety"]["integration_behavior_changed"] is False
assert receipt["test_count"]==36 and receipt["exact_output_count_including_receipt"]==8
assert receipt["existing_live_source_files_modified"]==1 and receipt["webui_source_modified"] is False
for key in ("network_used","packages_installed","models_loaded","comfyui_launched","k_accessed"):
 assert receipt[key] is False and coverage[key] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3I_R2_EXACT_OUTPUTS_AND_BOUNDARIES_OK")
